screenSummary.playArea: The play area shows the local sky from an observer's horizon, with the cardinal directions and the Sun and stars rising and setting as the sky rotates.
screenSummary.controlArea: The control area has a Reset All button that returns the simulation to its starting state.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Explore how the sky looks from your location above the horizon.

horizonSystem.currentDetails: The horizon view is in its initial state.

screenSummary.playArea: The play area shows the celestial sphere with the celestial equator, the ecliptic, the celestial poles, and the observer's horizon plane cutting through it.
screenSummary.controlArea: The control area has a Reset All button that returns the simulation to its starting state.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Explore how the celestial sphere is oriented relative to your horizon.

celestialSphere.currentDetails: The celestial sphere is in its initial state.

screenSummary.playArea: The play area combines the horizon diagram and the celestial sphere, letting you change your latitude and advance time to watch the sky rotate.
screenSummary.controlArea: The control area has a Reset All button that returns the simulation to its starting state.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Adjust the latitude and advance time to explore the rotating sky.

explorer.currentDetails: The explorer is in its initial state.
